allow: Bash(python -c "import json; h=json.load\(open\('models/multitask/yolo11n_multitask_twostage_lambda0.5_20260502_1029/training_history.json'\)\); print\('Total epochs:', len\(h.get\('train_loss', []\)\)\); print\('Best val:', min\(h.get\('val_loss', [99999]\)\)\); print\('Best sev acc:', max\(h.get\('val_sev_acc', [0]\)\)\); print\('Last epoch sev acc:', h.get\('val_sev_acc', [0]\)[-1] if h.get\('val_sev_acc'\) else 'N/A'\); print\('Last epoch sev mae:', h.get\('val_sev_mae', [0]\)[-1] if h.get\('val_sev_mae'\) else 'N/A'\)")
